arts.ttl: Newcastle United have Premier League second place advantage over Arsenal after major boost
arts.sum: Liverpool's 13 point safety-net at the top of the table seemingly leaves the title race all wrapped up, but with just four points separating Newcastle United and Arsenal the fight for the second place spot is only just beginning. With only six games left to play before this year's Premier League comes to a close, Newcastle's race for second place may have been handed a huge boost.

arts.ttl: Manager makes ‘next step’ admission over Newcastle United transfer target
arts.sum: Monaco manager Adi Hutter has hinted that winger Maghnes Akliouche is ready to take the ‘next step’ amid transfer links with Newcastle United ahead of the summer window. Those clubs interested have now been handed a potential boost in their pursuit with Hutter appearing to admit that the player may move on this summer.

arts.ttl: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia “wound” remains open – Aston Villa thought to hold answer
arts.sum: Napoli begrudgingly sold Khvicha Kvaratskhelia to Paris Saint-Germain in the last January window. After a deal fell through in the summer, the Ligue 1 champions finally secured their priority target. But for the Serie A club, a replacement is still needed. Described as a ‘wound’ still left in Antonio Conte’s starting XI by SpazioNapoli, it’s The post Khvicha Kvaratskhelia “wound” remains open – Aston Villa thought to hold answer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: I never wanted to leave Newcastle United for Aston Villa but was Player of the Year months later
arts.sum: For many Newcastle United fans, the name Nobby Solano instantly transports them back nearly twenty years to a different Premier League where players could show off their personality and flair. The move came to fruition after the winger began to fall out of favour under Sir Bobby Robson, and with an out-of-position Lee Bowyer favoured out wide he knew his days were numbered.

arts.ttl: “Eddie Howe would be happy” – Newcastle one of few clubs that can afford Juventus star
arts.sum: Newcastle United are one of the few sides that can afford the wages of Juventus man Dusan Vlahovic, according to Italian media, while Eddie Howe would be “very happy” with his signing. A report from CalcioMercato has revealed the manager’s intentions should Alexander Isak, who’s been linked extensively away from St James’ Park, depart the The post “Eddie Howe would be happy” – Newcastle one of few clubs that can afford Juventus star appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Atletico Madrid 'circling' for midfielder, facing La Liga competition
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are reportedly among a number of clubs who are contemplating whether to make an approach for an Aston Villa midfielder during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Newcastle make contact with Bayern defender
arts.sum: Chelsea and Newcastle United have both spoken to the representatives of Bayern Munich defender Kim Min-jae, who is open to leaving the German side this summer. Bayern Munich are willing to listen to offers for the South Korean centre-back, following a mixed time with the club. Juventus are also admirers of Min-jae, who excelled at […] The post Chelsea and Newcastle make contact with Bayern defender first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How 'sensational' Aston Villa surprised pundit as concern lingers for clash against 'monsters'
arts.sum: It's a big evening in the Champions League race at Villa Park as Aston Villa take on Newcastle, with Chris Sutton and Paul Merson running the rule over the in-form sides Villa go into the game (5.30pm kick-off) off the back of four straight Premier League victories and following their superb effort against PSG in the Champions League quarter-finals in midweek, Unai Emery’s men going close to one of the all-time great European fightbacks.

arts.ttl: 'Wow' - Unai Emery reveals Jason Tindall and Newcastle United feelings after Aston Villa brawl - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: However, Emery has tried to play down the bust-up by saying he has no issue with the Newcastle coaching team while offering his thoughts to Howe and his recovery. Aston Villa boss Unai Emery says he has "no problem" with Newcastle United's Jason Tindall after the two men were involved in a huge brawl during the last meeting between Aston Villa and the Magpies on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United head to Aston Villa in the Premier League this evening with both teams chasing Champions League football. The Magpies are targeting a seventh straight win in all competitions.
